languages.original_text: "Nuncius has drawn my attention to the fact that this creature possesses a distinctive signalling system, together with a host of behavioural rituals. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. If we are to subdue this creature, then we must first learn and correctly interpret its reactions to various... stressors."

languages.text: "Нунциус обратил мое внимание на то, что у этого создания есть отчетливая сигнальная система вкупе с набором поведенческих ритуалов. Омниссия учит, что понимание есть истинный путь к познанию. Чтобы усмирить это существо, нужно постичь и верно интерпретировать его реакции на разные... раздражители".
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスと私は、この生き物は行動パターンを示していることに気づきました。つまり、研究対象として扱えるということです。オムニシアは、理解こそが知識への真の道だと教えてくれます。敵の行動の基本要素を理解するだけで、技術的な勝利を得ることができるのです」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I have noted that this creature displays patterns of behaviour, which means it can be studied. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. It is enough to understand the basic elements of an enemy's behaviour to gain a technical victory over it."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンシウスと私は、この生き物は行動パターンを示していることに気づきました。つまり、研究対象として扱えるということです。オムニシアは、理解こそが知識への真の道だと教えてくれます。敵の行動の基本要素を理解するだけで、技術的な勝利を得ることができるのです。」

languages.text: « Nuncius a attiré mon attention sur le fait que cette créature possédait un système de signalement spécial ainsi que toutes sortes de rituels comportementaux. L'Omnimessie nous enseigne que la compréhension est la seule voie menant à la connaissance. Si nous voulons venir à bout de cette créature, nous devons découvrir et apprendre à interpréter ses réactions à différents... facteurs de stress. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has drawn my attention to the fact that this creature possesses a distinctive signalling system, together with a host of behavioural rituals. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. If we are to subdue this creature, then we must first learn and correctly interpret its reactions to various... stressors."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius a attiré mon attention sur le fait que cette créature possédait un système de signalement spécial ainsi que toutes sortes de rituels comportementaux. L'Omnimessie nous enseigne que la compréhension est la seule voie menant à la connaissance. Si nous voulons venir à bout de cette créature, nous devons découvrir et apprendre à interpréter ses réactions à différents... facteurs de stress. »

languages.text: "Nuncius hat mich auf den Umstand hingewiesen, dass diese Kreatur über ein Alarmsystem und zahlreiche Verhaltensrituale verfügt. Der Omnissiah lehrt, dass Begreifen der wahre Weg zum Wissen ist. Wenn wir diese Kreatur unterwerfen wollen, müssen wir zunächst ihre Reaktionen auf verschiedene ... Stressfaktoren lernen und verstehen."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has drawn my attention to the fact that this creature possesses a distinctive signalling system, together with a host of behavioural rituals. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. If we are to subdue this creature, then we must first learn and correctly interpret its reactions to various... stressors."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius hat mich auf den Umstand hingewiesen, dass diese Kreatur über ein Alarmsystem und zahlreiche Verhaltensrituale verfügt. Der Omnissiah lehrt, dass Begreifen der wahre Weg zum Wissen ist. Wenn wir diese Kreatur unterwerfen wollen, müssen wir zunächst ihre Reaktionen auf verschiedene ... Stressfaktoren lernen und verstehen."

languages.text: "Nuncius, bu yaratığın bir dizi davranışsal ayinle birlikte kendine özgü bir sinyalizasyon sistemine sahip olduğu gerçeğine dikkatimi çekti. Hermesih, İdrak'in İrfan'a giden gerçek yol olduğunu öğretir. Eğer bu yaratığa boyun eğdireceksek öncelikle onun çeşitli... Stres faktörlerine karşı verdiği tepkileri öğrenmeli ve doğru yorumlamalıyız."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has drawn my attention to the fact that this creature possesses a distinctive signalling system, together with a host of behavioural rituals. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. If we are to subdue this creature, then we must first learn and correctly interpret its reactions to various... stressors."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, bu yaratığın bir dizi davranışsal ayinle birlikte kendine özgü bir sinyalizasyon sistemine sahip olduğu gerçeğine dikkatimi çekti. Hermesih, İdrak'in İrfan'a giden gerçek yol olduğunu öğretir. Eğer bu yaratığa boyun eğdireceksek öncelikle onun çeşitli... Stres faktörlerine karşı verdiği tepkileri öğrenmeli ve doğru yorumlamalıyız."

languages.text: «Nuncius me ha indicado que esta criatura posee un sistema de señales característico junto con numerosos rituales de comportamiento. El Omnissiah nos enseña que la comprensión es el verdadero camino hacia el conocimiento. Si vamos a someter a esta criatura, debemos estudiar e interpretar sus respuestas a diversos... factores de estrés».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has drawn my attention to the fact that this creature possesses a distinctive signalling system, together with a host of behavioural rituals. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. If we are to subdue this creature, then we must first learn and correctly interpret its reactions to various... stressors."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius me ha indicado que esta criatura posee un sistema de señales característico junto con numerosos rituales de comportamiento. El Omnissiah nos enseña que la comprensión es el verdadero camino hacia el conocimiento. Si vamos a someter a esta criatura, debemos estudiar e interpretar sus respuestas a diversos... factores de estrés».

languages.text: “努恩修斯提醒我注意，这个生物拥有独特的信号交流系统，以及一整套行为仪式。欧姆尼赛亚教导我们：理解才是通往知识的真正道路。若想制服这种生物，我们必须先了解并正确解读它对各种……刺激源的反应。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has drawn my attention to the fact that this creature possesses a distinctive signalling system, together with a host of behavioural rituals. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. If we are to subdue this creature, then we must first learn and correctly interpret its reactions to various... stressors."
